description: A law firm's ethics counsel needs to check for any new ethics opinions issued by the state bar association in the last month.

nodes.task_description: Navigate to the state bar association's website and find the 'Ethics Opinions' section.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully locates the correct webpage.

nodes.task_description: Filter the opinions by date to see what has been published in the last 30 days.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies one new ethics opinion.

nodes.task_description: Summarize the new opinion and its potential impact on the firm's practices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a concise summary for internal distribution.
